name: Harden Dev Container Sandbox
description: Hardens the dev container sandbox: blocks credential leaks (GH_TOKEN, SSH agent, git askpass), unsets host IPC variables, sets git safe.directory, and writes Claude Code onboarding flag. Pair with runArgs cap-drop and named volume mounts in your devcontainer.json for full isolation.

unsetHostIpc.description: Write /etc/profile.d/99-harden-sandbox.sh to unset VS Code / remote-containers / GPG / display IPC env vars in interactive shells.

writeOnboardingFlag.description: Write ~/.claude.json with hasCompletedOnboarding=true so Claude Code skips the first-run prompt.

addGitSafeDirectory.description: Add /workspace (and the detected workspace path) as a global git safe.directory to avoid 'dubious ownership' errors on bind-mounted repos.

disableCoreDumps.description: Set 'ulimit -c 0' in /etc/profile.d so processes cannot leave core dumps (which may contain in-memory secrets) on disk.

persistShellHistory.description: Redirect bash/zsh HISTFILE to /commandhistory/.shell_history when /commandhistory exists (pairs with a named-volume mount in your devcontainer.json).
